page: Microsoft Azure D32s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, mapped from 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The system features hyper-threading with two threads per core, 48 KB L1d cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and a large 480 MB L3 cache. It includes 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reach top-tier levels within the top 10%, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression remains strong in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth across both small and large blocks fall within the average range. Cryptographic capabilities are strong, as evidenced by the PassMark CPU encryption test. For language model workloads, prompt processing for small and medium models is strong, though text generation for large 70B models is weak, placing in the bottom 25%.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D32s_v7 offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads that require high single-core speed and substantial memory without the overhead of dedicated local storage. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-effective choice for workloads relying on external Premium Storage. This server is well-suited for applications such as static web serving, database operations, and moderate-scale LLM prompt processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv7 family, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor. It features 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs across 16 physical cores and 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs but is Premium Storage capable. Performance benchmarks show top-tier single-threaded compression and strong single-core CPU execution, alongside average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth. It supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and AMX, and features a large 480 MB L3 cache. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, database operations, and moderate-scale language model prompt processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v7 is a general-purpose VM featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 4.2 GHz and 128 GB RAM. It delivers strong single-core performance and is optimized for Premium Storage workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32s_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and strong single-core performance, optimized for Premium Storage.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processors, robust single-core performance, and support for premium external storage.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor
128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Top-tier single-threaded compression and strong single-core benchmark performance
No local storage or GPUs, optimized instead for external Premium Storage
Suited for static web serving, database operations, and moderate prompt processing
